prerequisites: A Fauna account with a database containing the collection you want to sync.
Access to the Fauna Dashboard or fauna shell to create a role and key.
The connection details for your database, which set the required `domain`, `port`, and `scheme` config fields.
A Fauna key secret with read access to the collections and indexes you want to sync.

authMethods.name: Fauna key secret
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with a Fauna key secret supplied in the connector's required `secret` field. Create a key (via CreateKey or the Dashboard) bound to a role that grants read access to the collections and indexes you intend to sync. The secret is only ever displayed once at creation, so store it securely; if you lose it, create a new key.

setupSteps.title: Create a read-only role in Fauna
setupSteps.body: In the Fauna Dashboard or fauna shell, create a role granting read access to the resources you will sync. For a full sync, use CreateRole with privileges for `read: true` on Collections(), Indexes(), and the specific Collection you want to export.

setupSteps.title: Generate a key and copy its secret
setupSteps.body: Create a key bound to the read-only role, for example with CreateKey({ role: Role("airbyte-readonly") }). Copy the returned secret immediately, since it is only ever displayed once. This value goes into the connector's required `secret` field.

setupSteps.title: Provide the connection endpoint
setupSteps.body: Set the required `domain` field to your database's domain, `scheme` to the protocol, and `port` to the connection port. All three are required config fields.

setupSteps.title: Select the collection and configure incremental sync (optional)
setupSteps.body: Set the optional `collection` field to the collection you want to sync. For incremental syncs, first create an index on the collection that emits the `ts` and `ref` fields, and ensure the key's role also has read access to that index.

sources.title: Airbyte Fauna source connector setup guide
